nasb.text: but for Cain and for his offering He had no regard. So Cain became very angry and his countenance fell.

esv.text: but for Cain and his offering he had no regard. So Cain was very angry, and his face fell.

cnv.text: 只是沒有看中該隱和他的禮物。該隱就非常忿怒，垂頭喪氣。

ccb.text: 却不悦纳该隐和他的祭物。该隐便非常恼火，面带怒容。

csbs.text: 却没有看重该隐和他的供物。该隐就极其恼火，他的脸沉了下来。
